name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and peanut butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the brown sugar and mix to blend.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Alternately add flour mixture with milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix until just combined.
6. Stir in vanilla.
7. Pour batter into 2 well-greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cakes comes out clean, about 45 minutes.
9. Cool on wire racks to room temperature.
10. Spread half of the Peanut Butter Filling over the tops of each cake using a metal spatula dipped in hot water.
11. Spread Chocolate Glaze over the cake while it is warm. As the glaze cools, it will thicken.
Peanut Butter Filling:
- 1 cup cream cheese (softened)
- 1/2 cup creamy peanut butter
Chocolate Glaze:
- 1/2 cup water
- 4 tablespoons unsalted butter
- 1/2 cup cocoa (sifted)
- 1 cup powdered sugar (unsifted)
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
